chunks.text: On a rainy Sunday, I sat by the window and wondered about many things.
I do not know where my brother went.
I wanted to understand why my sister was crying.
I even tried to guess what my mother was making for dinner.
I wanted to call Tom and ask him
“ Can you tell me what time you will come tomorrow?
I have wondered for a long time where my father studied when he was young.
But I could not ask him easily.
There are so many things I want to know.
Each time I try, the world around me seems to grow a little wider.
